description: Invoice accounting distribution table for Oracle Accounts Payable. Each record represents an accounting or charge distribution derived from an invoice line, matched purchase order distribution, tax calculation, or prepayment application and is used to drive expense recognition, accrual accounting, project charging, and General Ledger posting.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_DATE
columns.description: Accounting date used to recognize the transaction in Subledger Accounting and General Ledger.

columns.name: ACCRUAL_POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether accrual posted applies to the record.

columns.name: ASSETS_ADDITION_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether assets addition applies to the record.

columns.name: ASSETS_TRACKING_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether assets tracking applies to the record.

columns.name: CASH_POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether cash posted applies to the record.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence distribution line nu.

columns.name: DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the General Ledger distribution account charged by the transaction.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier invoice header associated with the line, distribution, schedule, or payment.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying line type lookup for the record.

columns.name: PERIOD_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with period.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Liability account combination charged for the supplier invoice or payment accounting entry.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for the transaction in the transaction currency.

columns.name: BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Functional currency amount derived from the entered transaction amount.

columns.name: BASE_INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: BATCH_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the import, entry, or processing batch that grouped the transaction.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_VARIANCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: FINAL_MATCH_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether final match applies to the record.

columns.name: INCOME_TAX_REGION
columns.description: Income tax region used for statutory reporting or withholding processing.

columns.name: INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: MATCH_STATUS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates the current matching status of the invoice distribution against purchasing or receiving records.

columns.name: POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether posted applies to the record.

columns.name: PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
columns.description: Purchase order distribution referenced by the matched transaction.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: QUANTITY_INVOICED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity for the transaction.

columns.name: RATE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related rate var code combination record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: REVERSAL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether reversal applies to the record.

columns.name: TYPE_1099
columns.description: 1099 reporting classification assigned to the supplier transaction for statutory reporting.

columns.name: UNIT_PRICE
columns.description: Unit price used to calculate the transaction amount.

columns.name: AMOUNT_ENCUMBERED
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: BASE_AMOUNT_ENCUMBERED
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ENCUMBERED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether encumbered applies to the record.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether price adjustment applies to the record.

columns.name: PRICE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related price var code combination record.

columns.name: QUANTITY_UNENCUMBERED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity une for the transaction.

columns.name: STAT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing stat for the transaction.

columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice distribution used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PA_ADDITION_FLAG

columns.name: PREPAY_AMOUNT_REMAINING

columns.description: Project accounting context used to derive project-related charging and accounting behavior.

business_questions: Show accounting distributions created for a supplier invoice.
Find invoice distributions matched to a purchase order distribution.
Display expense, accrual, and tax distribution amounts by invoice.
Show invoice distributions pending accounting or posting.
Find project-related invoice distributions by project or task.
Analyze invoice price variance and exchange rate variance amounts.
List distributions created from prepayment applications.
Show distributions by line type and General Ledger account.
